sections.paragraph:
Original: חרל חרוּל

Transliteration: chârûl chârûl

Phonetic: khaw-rool'

BDB Definition:

  1. nettles, weeds, kind of weed (perhaps chickpea)

Origin: apparently, a pass. participle of an unused root probably meaning to be prickly

TWOT entry: 743a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
